subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O Lord of Names and Creator of heaven! Thou beholdest one of Thy servants who hath turned unto Thee and attained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا مالک الاسماء و فاطر السماء تری عبدا من عبادک اقبل الیک و فاز
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
